landing.title: Find your lost pet
landing.subtitle: A platform to help pet owners find their lost companions
landing.description: Register your pet and receive a collar with a unique QR code. If someone finds your pet, they can scan the code and contact you instantly via WhatsApp.

feature1.title: Easy to use
feature1.description: A simple form to enter your pet's information

feature2.title: Collar with QR Code
feature2.description: Receive a stylish collar with an integrated unique QR code

feature3.title: Fast contact
feature3.description: The person who finds your pet can contact you directly via WhatsApp

step2.title: Add your pet
step2.description: Enter name, photo and contact details

step3.title: Order your collar
step3.description: After approval, receive your collar with QR code

step4.title: Protect your pet
step4.description: Put on the collar and be contacted if your pet is found

form.title: Add your pet
form.messagePlaceholder: Add additional information about your pet

validation.ownerNameMin: Name must contain at least 2 characters
validation.petNameMin: Pet name must contain at least 2 characters
validation.phoneInvalid: The number must contain exactly 9 digits after +212
validation.photoSize: Photo size must be less than 5 MB
validation.photoFormat: Photo format must be jpg, png or webp
validation.messageMax: Message must be less than 500 characters

thankYou.title: Thank You!
thankYou.message: Your request has been received and is currently being reviewed.

nextSteps.title: Next Steps
nextSteps.step1: Our team will review your request
nextSteps.step2: After approval, we will contact you for delivery
nextSteps.step3: Receive your collar with QR code and protect your pet

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noPets: You haven't added any pets yet

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.approveConfirm: Are you sure you want to approve this submission?
admin.rejectConfirm: Are you sure you want to reject this submission?
admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this submission? This action is irreversible.

petPage.title: Pet Information
petPage.notFoundMessage: This pet may have been deleted or the link is incorrect.
petPage.whatsappMessage: Hello! I found your pet {{petName}}. I am contacting you via FindMyPet.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.googleFailed: Google login failed. Please try again.
